title: Phase 8: Wire document access control to authenticated sessions
description: Wire document access control to authenticated sessions. The auth system is fully built (argon2id, MFA, sessions via cookies). The gap is that document-access.service.ts and routes that serve documents are not calling requireAuth() or checking session.userId against document ownership. Deliverable: audit every route in server/routes/documents.ts (and any other document-serving routes) to confirm requireAuth() middleware is applied; wire document-access.service.ts to use the authenticated userId from the session (not a passed-in parameter that could be spoofed); add integration tests proving unauthenticated requests to document endpoints return 401. All tests must pass (currently 3,208). Branch off main.
acceptance_criteria: Every route in server/routes/documents.ts (and any other document-serving routes) has requireAuth() middleware applied
document-access.service.ts uses the authenticated userId from the session (not a passed-in parameter that could be spoofed)
Integration tests prove unauthenticated requests to document endpoints return 401
All existing 3,208 tests continue to pass
Direct API calls without valid session are blocked — 401 returned
